title: The RealReal Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2020 Results
text: The RealReal reported financial results for Q4 2020 and full year 2020. Gross Merchandise Volume (GMV) for the year was $301.2 million, a 1% year-over-year decrease. However, the company exited the year with strong momentum, with December GMV increasing 6% year-over-year. Q4 showed particularly strong performance with sequential acceleration from Q3, demonstrating improving market conditions and strong holiday season demand. Management highlighted the resilience of the luxury resale market despite pandemic uncertainties and the continued strength of repeat buyer engagement. The company emphasized the opportunities for future growth as consumer preferences shifted toward sustainable and value-conscious shopping.
